name: Salmon-Spinach Party Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and thoroughly drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon.
2. Combine the flaked salmon with all remaining ingredients, except vegetables and crackers.
3. Chill several hours to blend flavors.
4. Serve the dip with vegetables and crackers.
Makes 16 servings, about 4 cups.
